original text:
Go green and keep our island clean. This monthly recycling event takes place every third Saturday. Drop off your recyclables from 9:00 AM - 12:00 PM at the parking lot of Lahaina Cannery Mall.
Items NOT accepted include propane tanks, green waste, furniture, trash, motor oil, hazardous fluids/waste, paint, vehicles. As of July 2016, we can no longer accept cooking oil, household batteries, glasses, hearing aids, and books.
Not sure if your item will be accepted? Call to ask, 877-2524, or email info@cwdhawaii.org.

original text:
Looking for a way to take Mom out during the Valentines Day season? We've got the answer: a dinner of baked sphagetti, crisp salad, crunchy bread and a dessert on February 9th from 5:30 - 7 pm. Cost is $9 per person.
Reservations required by email: mistycreekfm@yadtel.net.

original text:
Table Purchasers: submit GUEST LIST to Joyce Lau at joyce.lau10@hawaiiantel.net by April 15.
The University of Hawaii Foundation (UHF) receives, receipts, and holds funds raised by the UH Men's Basketball program. UHF is a registered 501(c)(3) charitable organization.
In compliance with NCAA regulations regarding benefits to Prospective Student-Athletes, please advise if your guest is in the 7th to 12th grade as some restrictrions may apply.
Proceeds from banquet will go towards summer school scholarships for Men's Basketball Student-Athletes.

original text:
Am I in a waking nightmare? Since when can Americans purchase a deadly poison via email?
This entry was posted in crime, Evil and tagged CDC, poison. Bookmark the permalink.
Call your local police and report this right away and file a police report. Also call the FBI and do the same. You may have been targeted by some type of gang. Do it now.
It may not be a Nigerian banking scam, Russian mail-order brides, cheap Viagra or "replica" Rolex watches, but sadly it's that easy... or it's another scam. Either way, not a good thing.
You can also forward spam emails to: spam@uce.gov an FCC government entity that supposedly tracks down and investigates unsolicited criminal spam email.
I am sure somebody here in my community has the real Cyanora. Live in a heavy Police, farming community. Feel sick to stomach, strange musty smells and nauseas when I visit my sister. Sick for days after with flu like symptoms after visit.
